sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1938" key="a)qemitofage/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀθεμιτο-φαγέω</orth>, <sense id="n1938.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eat unlawful meats</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:184:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">184.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
